nasb.text: If Satan casts out Satan, he is divided against himself; how then will his kingdom stand?

esv.text: And if Satan casts out Satan, he is divided against himself. How then will his kingdom stand?

cnv.text: 如果撒但趕逐撒但，就會自相紛爭。那麼，他的國怎能站立得住呢？

ccb.text: 若撒旦驱逐撒旦，就是自相纷争，它的国怎能维持呢？

csbs.text: 如果撒旦驱赶撒旦，就是自相纷争，它的国怎么能站立得住呢？
